message:
chore(beads): close bd-2f3i, bd-3uf8, bd-w3wj; add bd-3uf8 sub-issues

- bd-2f3i: closed — needless borrows clippy fix validated
- bd-3uf8: closed — compile timeout resolved via main.rs surface
  reduction and migration module feature-gating (189s vs 301s timeout)
- bd-w3wj: closed — high extension safety tier strictness revalidated
- bd-3uf8.3 through bd-3uf8.6: added as closed sub-issues documenting
  the incremental investigation and trimming steps
